subcodes.first_line: From the horizon of tribulation hath shone forth the Sun, whereon hath been inscribed by the Most Glorious Pen: "The Prison belongeth unto God, the One, the Single." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت من افق البلا شمس رقم علیها من قلم الابهی السجن لله الواحد الفرد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
